name: vibelabs-plugins
description: Vibe Labs Claude Code plugins — AI assistant spawner, Instagram analysis, stakeholder simulation, and more

plugins.name: assistant-spawner
plugins.description: Spawn a new AI executive assistant with Telegram bot, heartbeat, and memory system. Guided conversational setup via /spawn-assistant.

plugins.name: instaskill
plugins.description: Turn your Instagram saved posts into a searchable, analyzable archive. Sync, analyze, deep dive, and extract structured data from video.

plugins.name: github-multi-account
plugins.description: Auto-check and switch GitHub accounts before git push. Prevents 'Repository not found' errors when working with repos across multiple GitHub accounts.

plugins.name: mirofish
plugins.description: Stakeholder simulation for PR and marketing. Spawns a cast of persona subagents (press, activists, scientists, regulators, customers, investors) in parallel to react to a press release, then synthesizes consensus, disagreement, surprise signals, and coverage gaps. Ships with a 20-persona Aker BioMarine library that can be swapped for any industry.
